name: Glass Storage - Bullseye's Playground™
description: Discover the convenience of Glass Storage from Bullseye's Playground™, perfect for adding a touch of functionality to your space. Crafted from clear glass, this decorative jar stands at 8.71 inches tall and weighs 2.2 pounds, making it a sturdy addition to your home. The generous width of 5.9 inches offers ample space for storing small items, making it a great choice for your household needs.
